notes: FROZEN (daemon_capability: incapable): no phases asserted. A mid-turn kiro-cli abort writes its end_reason only to the sidecar <uuid>.json, never to the watched .jsonl; the parser emits turn_done only on a text-only AssistantMessage (no error epilogue) and no working-state idle sweep settles a stuck working session, so the ready->working->ready arc is unobservable. The kiro .jsonl carries no model/token/cost (those are sidecar-only), so observations are model=unknown, cost/tokens zero.
